title: Chat
description: Test conversations with your AI assistants
emptyHint: Select an AI assistant to start testing
emptyConversationHint: New conversation created. Send the first message to begin testing.
realtimeWorkspaceHint: Realtime mode hides the text composer and hands interaction over to the voice and video panel.
mockNotice: Responses are simulated. Real inference will be available after backend integration.
noConversations: No conversations yet. Create one below.
mode.helper.omni: End-to-end realtime voice for duplex conversations
mode.helper.synthetic: ASR + reasoning + playback for controllable voice interactions
realtimeStageDescription: Voice and live visuals stream side by side here so the AI can watch and respond continuously.
realtimeTranscriptEmpty: Once the session starts, live transcript turns from you and the AI will appear here.
syntheticMediaDescription: Upload visual media and synthetic realtime will keep the conversation grounded in that scene.
syntheticMediaReady: Media is ready. Once started, the session will keep reasoning against this visual context.
syntheticCameraOff: Enable the camera and each spoken turn will keep a rolling video context that is submitted before the AI replies.
syntheticCameraLive: Camera is on. The current turn is being recorded as live visual context.
syntheticCameraBuffered: The current turn video is ready, and the AI will use that scene before it replies.
syntheticCameraUnsupported: The current model or browser does not support synthetic realtime video input.
realtimeCameraOff: Enable the camera so the AI can keep watching your surroundings.
realtimeCameraUnsupported: This browser does not support camera capture.
toolMenuHint: Give this turn a few extra abilities
sourceNoSummary: No excerpt was returned for this source. The card is anchored from the cited answer text.
retrievalEmpty: This turn opened the context path, but no retrievable snippets were selected.

empty.title: No message details selected
empty.description: Open a source, context chip, or memory card under a message to inspect it here.

context.title: Sources & context
context.description: Inspect the sources, memories, and supporting materials behind this answer.
context.emptyTitle: No extra context for this turn
context.emptyDescription: This answer did not expose sources or retrievable context snippets.

memory.title: Memory writes
memory.description: Review memory items from this turn and edit, delete, or promote them when needed.
memory.noReason: No additional write rationale was provided.
memory.emptyTitle: No memory writes for this turn
memory.emptyDescription: When a reply produces memory write candidates, they will be managed here.
memory.actionFailed: Memory action failed. Please try again.

thinking.title: Thinking
thinking.description: Inspect the model's raw reasoning content.
thinking.note: This is the model's raw reasoning content. It is for inspection only and is not the final answer body.
thinking.emptyDescription: This answer did not return reasoning text.

debug.title: Debug data
debug.description: Inspect raw metadata, retrieval counts, and debug fields.
debug.emptyDescription: Switch to debug view to inspect raw metadata and retrieval details.

errors.generic: Sorry, something went wrong. Please try again.
errors.inferenceTimeout: The AI response timed out. Please try again shortly.
errors.modelUnconfigured: The AI service is not configured. Set DASHSCOPE_API_KEY and restart the API service.
errors.modelUnavailable: The model service is temporarily unavailable. Please try again shortly.
errors.voiceFailed: Voice processing failed. Please try again.
errors.turnProcessingFailed: This turn failed. Please try again.
errors.microphoneRequired: Microphone permission is required to start voice chat.
errors.cameraRequired: Camera permission is required to enable live visual context.
errors.cameraUnavailable: Camera access is temporarily unavailable on this device.
errors.connectionFailed: Realtime connection failed. Please try again.
errors.autoplayBlocked: Your browser blocked automatic audio playback. Click voice again or check your mute settings.
errors.readAloudFailed: Read aloud failed. Please try again.
errors.imageUploadFailed: Image understanding failed. Please try again.
errors.streamError: An error occurred while streaming the response.
errors.noAudioInput: No audio detected. Please check your microphone.
errors.emptyTranscription: No speech recognized. Please try again.
